description: Calculate the Jaccard Index (Intersection over Union) for simulated microscopy images `channel_1.tif` (nuclear stain) and `channel_2.tif` (cytoplasmic stain) located at `~/Fiji_Data/raw/jaccard/` to quantify their spatial overlap. Use the Otsu auto-threshold method to create binary masks for both images. Produce an intersection mask and a union mask, saving them to `~/Fiji_Data/results/jaccard/intersection_mask.tif` and `~/Fiji_Data/results/jaccard/union_mask.tif` respectively. Record the calculated Jaccard Index, intersection area, and union area in `~/Fiji_Data/results/jaccard/results.csv` using the format: `jaccard_index,intersection_area,union_area`.
